channel.title: WoW on RaihnForge
channel.description: Recent content in WoW on RaihnForge

item.title: Dahnjin - Undead Troll
item.description: Image created for friend of mine.  Thanks buddy, hope you enjoy! :D

item.title: Frost Mage - Lady of Ice
item.description:
The Frost Mage was a commission piece for a wow character.  It was fun trying to incorporate the misc. WoW gear and tabard.  I would love to have spent more time fixing the hands as well as rendering the staff of weirdness.

What I love most about the image is the jovial nature and smile the character has.  When I look at the image I’m reminded of the fun aspect of playing video games, where as a lot of illustrations try to take a game like WoW to a melodramatic extreme.  This image just conveys the players attitude more than the in game reality of situations.

item.title: Manner Plz
item.description:
This is a cartoon I created for Amnesty’s article, “Manner Wars,” on WCreplays.com. Click here to check out the original article.

2012.02.25 – I revisited this image because I have learned a lot since the time I first created it.  Namely, I learned a little about inking and coloring digitally.  I retouched the image with some better color and inks, and added the Manner plz so that the image could stand on its own without too terribly much explanation.
